arts.ttl: Chris Sutton warns Philippe Clement 'this could get UGLY' as Rangers boss stares down his last Ibrox dance
arts.sum: Sutton reckons another derby defeat will see Rangers fans force the Belgian out of the Ibrox hot seat

arts.ttl: Vaclav Cerny deludes himself ahead of Celtic's clash against Rangers with nonsense claim
arts.sum: On where he gets the belief from that Rangers can beat Celtic: “We all saw the last game, the cup final. Vaclav Cerny claims it’s ‘logical’ to think that Rangers can beat Celtic

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Celtic: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: 2025 kicks off with a bang in the Scottish Premiership as Rangers host Celtic in the Old Firm derby. Celtic are 14 points clear of their eternal rivals at the summit with Thursday's hosts enduring an underwhelming campaign with Belgian Philippe Clement at the helm.

arts.ttl: Dermot Desmond's favourite Celtic transfer revealed despite initial doubts and 'battle' over signing
arts.sum: The Hoops favourite had the time of his life in Glasgow but things could have been much different

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours today: Andreas Pereira to Marseille, James McAtee to Celtic
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Andreas Pereira's possible switch to Marseille and the future of Manchester City's James McAtee.

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor makes clear what Celtic want to avoid against Rangers at Ibrox
arts.sum: If we take the chaos out of the game then it starts to look a bit more like what we want it to.” “From our point of view we want to stop the chaos and try to control the game a bit more.

arts.ttl: Kris Boyd drops truth bombs to Philippe Clement about Celtic and Rangers gap
arts.sum: Yes, Celtic continue to beat Rangers, but the title isn’t just won in the derby games, you have to beat the rest also and Boyd delivered a dose of reality to the under-fire boss regarding that too. Kris Boyd slams Philippe Clement’s talk of financial gap between Celtic and Rangers

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Celtic LIVE as team leak rumours explode and old Ger kits up in hour of need
arts.athr: reporters@dailyrecord.co.uk (Graeme Young, Ross Pilcher, Anthony Evans)
arts.sum: Philippe Clement has still to win a derby in Glasgow but is desperate to cut the 14-point gap Brendan Rodgers’ side boast

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Celtic Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: The 444th edition of the Old Firm derby takes place on Thursday, as Rangers host Celtic at Ibrox. Ahead of the match, we’ve made our score prediction, provided our predicted line-ups for bot...

arts.ttl: 'Completely unacceptable'... What's hurting Kenny Miller about Celtic ahead of Rangers game
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers also oversaw another Glasgow Derby win earlier this season when Celtic hammered Rangers at Parkhead in the league at Celtic Park. Speaking to Gabby Agbonlahor ahead of the big match, the talkSPORT presenter told Miller that Rangers should be trying to salvage some pride against Celtic this afternoon.
